input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.4.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.4.4
            TITLE: if starts / restarts are not accomplished in the above times, the vehicle may be dnf.

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.4.4: If starts / restarts are not accomplished in the above times, the vehicle may be DNF.
D.12.4.4 If starts / restarts are not accomplished in the above times, the vehicle may be DNF.

final_answer: If starts / restarts are not accomplished in the above times, the vehicle may be DNF.
